title: Hämeenlinna, Kanta-Häme — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Hämeenlinna, Kanta-Häme: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Hämeenlinna is a city in Kanta-Häme with a population of 68,000. A historic city with a medieval castle, birthplace of composer Sibelius, surrounded by lakes and forests.

Last updated: July 14, 2026
